backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor that combines blob storage and authorization mixins to implement user profile management, event/announcement CRUD, and a contact form with role-based access control.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report confirming that ServicesPage.tsx was updated to display Sheriff, Fire Department, and Ambulance emergency service listings with tel:911 links, mapped to test requirement REQ-9.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of all frontend source files, serving as a reference index for the project's frontend structure.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS entry file that defines OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark themes, covering background, foreground, primary, chart, and sidebar color tokens.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the Jackman Maine Town Website that mounts the React app into a root div and loads the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that configures TanStack Router with a shared Layout (Navigation + Footer) and defines routes for Home, About, Services, Events, Recreation, and Contact pages.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site footer component rendering the brand identity, quick navigation links, contact details, copyright year, and a caffeine.ai attribution link with UTM parameters.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Sticky header component with a top info bar, logo, desktop nav links with active-state highlighting, Internet Identity login/logout button, and a responsive mobile hamburger menu.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom React hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using TanStack Query, reinitializing and invalidating dependent queries whenever the Internet Identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication on the ICP platform, managing login state, identity persistence, and AuthClient lifecycle.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching and mutating backend data including events, town contact info, messages, and user profile/admin status.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that imports Google Fonts, sets up Tailwind directives, and defines a Northern Maine-themed CSS custom property palette for light and dark modes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/AboutPage.tsx: Static About page displaying town facts, logo, and descriptive text about Jackman, Maine using a two-column layout.
frontend/src/pages/ContactPage.tsx: Contact page that fetches town address and phone number from the backend and provides a form to submit messages via the actor.
frontend/src/pages/EventsPage.tsx: Events page that lists town events fetched from the backend, with admin-only controls to add or delete events using mutation hooks.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: The main landing page for the Jackman, Maine town website, featuring a hero section with navigation CTAs, quick links to Events/Recreation/Services, and highlight cards showcasing outdoor activities.
frontend/src/pages/RecreationPage.tsx: A page listing outdoor recreation activities available in Jackman, Maine (snowmobiling, fishing, hiking, paddling, camping, wildlife), each with a description and bullet-point highlights.
frontend/src/pages/ServicesPage.tsx: A town services directory page displaying emergency contacts (911), and municipal service details (Town Office, Public Works, Solid Waste, Library, Motor Vehicle Registration) with addresses, hours, and phone numbers.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading URL query parameters from both standard and hash-based routes, persisting values to sessionStorage, and cleaning sensitive parameters from the URL hash without a page reload.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom font families (Playfair Display, Source Sans 3), an extended color palette (forest, slate, amber using OKLCH), container settings, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Tracks the project state (version 5) for the Jackman, Maine town website, listing all existing features, requirements, and architectural notes.
